transcript:
CALLER: Hello. I have ESI — Employee State Insurance. Kya aapka clinic ESI empanelled hai?
AGENT: Haan ji, Sunrise Multispeciality Clinic ESIC empanelled hospital hai. ESI cardholders treatment le sakte hain yahan.
CALLER: Aur family members — wife aur bacche — bhi cover honge?
AGENT: Haan, ESIC mein employee ke dependents — spouse aur children — bhi covered hote hain. ESIC card aur dependent registration proof laana hoga.
CALLER: IPD ke liye bhi chalega? Matlab admit karne ke liye?
AGENT: Haan, IPD bhi covered hai ESIC ke through for empanelled conditions. Please ESIC dispensary se referral letter leke aaye admission ke liye.
CALLER: Bahut achha. Shukriya aapka.
